zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir David Buccleuch Scott於1427年出生在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾霍其可時，他的父親Sir Walter Scott34歲，母親Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland25歲。他於1444年與Lady Janet Somerville在英國蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾艾特利可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1492年3月在蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾布可洛享年65歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾皮布萊斯克羅斯 柯克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir David Buccleuch Scott于1427年出生在英国苏格兰洛包爾霍其可时，他的父亲Sir Walter Scott34岁，母亲Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland25岁。他于1444年与Lady Janet Somerville在英国苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾艾特利可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1492年3月在苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾布可洛享年65岁，埋葬在苏格兰皮布萊爾皮布萊斯克羅斯 柯克。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir David Buccleuch Scott was born in 1427, in Hawick, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Walter Scott, was 34 and his mother, Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland, was 25. He married Lady Janet Somerville in 1444, in Ettrick, Selkirkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died in March 1492, in Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Scotland, at the age of 65, and was buried in Cross Kirk, Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir David Buccleuch Scott est né en 1427, à Hawick, Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Walter Scott, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Janet Somerville en 1444, à Ettrick, Selkirkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en mars 1492, à Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Cross Kirk, Peebles, Valle de Twede, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir David Buccleuch Scott 1427 in Hawick, Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter Scott 34 und seine Mutter Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland 25. Er hat 1444 in Ettrick, Selkirkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Janet Somerville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im März 1492 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Scotland und wurde in Cross Kirk, Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland begraben.

Lui sposato Lady Janet Somerville nel 1444, nel Ettrick, Selkirkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir David Buccleuch Scottが1427年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアハウィックで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Scottは34歳，母Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderlandは25歳であった。1444年にイギリススコットランドセルキルクシュアイアエットリックでLady Janet Somervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1492年3月にスコットランドセルキルクシュアイアブククレウチで65歳で死去し，スコットランドペエブレシュアイアペエブレスクロス キルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir David Buccleuch Scott(이)가 1427년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 호이c크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter Scott(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1444년 영국 스코틀랜드 셀커크실르 트릭에서 Lady Janet Somerville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1492년 3월 스컷랜드 셀커크실르 버치레우치에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피블레실르 피블레스 크로스 커크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir David Buccleuch Scott nasceu em 1427, em Hawick, Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Walter Scott, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Janet Somerville em 1444, em Ettrick, Selkirkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em março de 1492, em Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Scotland, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Cross Kirk, Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir David Buccleuch Scott родился в 1427 г. в местности хавикк, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Walter Scott было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Janet Somerville в 1444 г. в местности эттрикк, селкиркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер марта 1492 г. в местности букклеуч, селкиркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности кросс кирк, пиблесь, пиблессхир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Lady Janet Somerville en 1444, en Ettrick, Selkirkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en marzo de 1492, en Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Cross Kirk, Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland.
